history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is lava, and the cell to my left (west) is a wall. The only safe adjacent cell is to my right (east), which appears to be a floor cell. I will turn right to face east, then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly north (ahead) is a floor cell, which is safe. To the left is lava, to the right is a wall, and behind is unknown. Moving forward appears to be the only safe and productive action to explore the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row, facing north. Directly ahead is a floor cell (row6, col4). The left neighbor is lava, and the right neighbor is a wall. The only safe move is to go forward. This will allow me to explore further north along the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently at the bottom center of the view, facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is a floor tile ('.'), so moving forward is safe. Turning left would face west into a lava cell, and turning right would face east into a wall, so the only viable

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is floor ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. Turning left would face lava, and turning right would face a wall. Moving forward will allow exploration toward the north.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is floor, so it is safe to move forward. The cell further north is lava, but that will be dealt with later. No other safe direction is available (left is lava, right is wall). Moving forward will bring me closer to the unknown area and potentially the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so it's not safe to move forward. The cell to the right is a wall, and the cell to the left is floor. Turning left will allow me to move west into a safe empty cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is floor, and the goal is to the north and east. Moving forward is safe and progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (up). The cell directly ahead is floor (row6, col3). The path to the goal at (row2, col5) goes straight up five steps to (row2, col3), then east two steps. Moving forward now is safe and necessary.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row6 col3 facing north. The cell directly ahead (row5 col3) is floor, and the path north continues through safe cells to row2 col3, then east to the goal at row2 col5. Moving forward is safe and progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row7, col3 facing north. The cell directly ahead (row6, col3) is floor (safe). Moving forward continues the path north toward the goal. The goal is at row4, col5, reachable by moving north three times then east twice. No lava or wall blocks the immediate forward move.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row7 col4 facing north. The cell directly ahead (row6 col4) is floor (safe). Moving forward continues the path north toward the goal. After reaching row5 col4, we will need to turn right to go east to the goal at row5 col6. No immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row7, col3 facing north. The cell directly ahead (row6, col3) is floor (safe). Moving forward will bring us to row6, col3. From there, we can turn right to face east and move twice to reach the goal at row6, col5. No immediate danger.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
